message:
test(proptest): add 44 property-based tests for workflows.rs types (ft-nzj4d)

Covers DescriptorStep/Matcher/ControlKey serde roundtrips,
WorkflowStartResult/ExecutionResult state invariants and JSON tags,
ExecutionStatus snake_case serialization, UnstickReport aggregation
and human_summary, UnstickConfig/Finding serde, WaitConditionResult
state machine, GroupLockResult/Conflict, WorkflowExecution serde,
DescriptorTrigger, WorkflowStep, and DescriptorLimits defaults.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
